## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Run command '...'
2. With configuration '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Error Output

If applicable, paste the full error traceback:

```
paste error output here
```

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14.0]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.10, 3.11, 3.12]
- PyTorch version: [e.g., 2.0.0]
- TSN-Affinity version: [e.g., 0.1.0]
- GPU: [e.g., NVIDIA A100, CPU only]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (screenshots, logs, etc.).

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this has not been reported before
- [ ] I am using a supported Python version (>=3.10)
